text.title: PR Time + Cost Diff Tool Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping PR diff surface + repo capability signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Every leaf is a conclusion ref bound to a rule id.

conclusion.verdict: skip — no surface or no eval set
skip this PR; no LLM surface touched
block until seed pinned and replay variance stable
replay eval, emit three deltas + pass-rate delta

example.trace: capable=true → surface_touch=true → deterministic=true → report-three-deltas → checker emits md/p95/$/eval-rate; budget check decides verdict

text.example: Canonical traversal from root question through branches to a single conclusion.
